title: Introduction to Windchill eBOM Knowledge Check

questions.question: An end item in a part structure may contain which of the following?
options: Both other parts and other end items
questions.rationale: An end item in a part structure may contain both other parts and other end items. End items typically represent the top node of a product structure, but they can also appear throughout the structure containing both regular parts and nested end items.

questions.question: Which design approach creates Windchill parts automatically from CAD documents?
questions.rationale: Bottom-Up Design (CAD-Driven) automatically creates Windchill parts from CAD documents when the assembly is checked into Windchill. Top-Down Design creates parts first in Windchill, independent of CAD, and then distributes design tasks to engineering teams.

questions.question: What type of BOM defines the design of the finished product and includes all part specifications?
questions.rationale: The eBOM (Engineering Bill of Materials) defines the design of the finished product and includes all alternative and substitute part numbers, product codes, part names, revisions, descriptions, quantities, and specifications. The mBOM focuses on manufacturing processes and the sBOM represents the product at the sales stage.

questions.question: What is the primary benefit of synchronizing eBOM, mBOM, and sBOM structures through the digital thread?
options: It eliminates the need for CAD documents
It creates a single source of truth that defines the product
It replaces the need for product structure filters
questions.rationale: When eBOM, mBOM, and sBOM structures are synchronized in real time via the digital thread, they critically inform a single source of truth that defines the product. This keeps dispersed teams aligned and facilitates real-time access to every product detail. It does not eliminate CAD documents, automatically generate manufacturing instructions, or replace filters.

questions.question: Which Windchill object is a logical database representation of a physical item used to build a product?
questions.rationale: A Windchill part is a logical database representation of a physical item used to build a product. It organizes product information through relationships and enables associated data. A CAD document represents a CAD model. An end item is a special type of part at the top node. A usage link is a relationship between parts.
